results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Memory items across orthogonal semantic + temporal + causal + entity graphs + policy-guided traversal + query-adaptive selection IS the 5-role-tag multifunctional memory node + per-role retrieval channel mechanism.
Graph-based agent memory taxonomy + structured topological model covers multifunctional memory node paradigm.
EXACT TWIN — Typed-fields queryable metadata filtering IS the 5-role-tag multifunctional memory mechanism.
Structure + retrieval + evolution graph-based agent memory covers multifunctional node + retrieval mechanism.
LLM memory graph + relational connection covers multi-role tag + relational retrieval paradigm.
Graph memory + relational reasoning covers multifunctional tag-based relational retrieval mechanism.
Comprehensive agent memory survey covers tagged/multifunctional memory paradigm.
EXACT TWIN — Temporal-aware conversational agents with structured event retrieval IS the seasonal-tag activation + temporal-anchor mechanism.
